const initialState = {
  display: "0",
  expr: "",
};

function view(state) {
  return (
    <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "1rem", padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)", color: "var(--color-text)", fontFamily: "monospace" }}>
      <div style={{ fontSize: "2rem", textAlign: "right", padding: "0.5rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--color-text)", borderRadius: "0.25rem", minHeight: "2rem" }}>
        {state.display}
      </div>
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4, 1fr)", gap: "0.5rem" }}>
        <button data-action="clear" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          C
        </button>
        <button data-action="delete" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          DEL
        </button>
        <button data-action="divide" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          ÷
        </button>
        <button data-action="multiply" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          ×
        </button>
        <button data-action="7" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          7
        </button>
        <button data-action="8" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          8
        </button>
        <button data-action="9" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          9
        </button>
        <button data-action="subtract" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          −
        </button>
        <button data-action="4" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          4
        </button>
        <button data-action="5" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          5
        </button>
        <button data-action="6" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          6
        </button>
        <button data-action="add" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          +
        </button>
        <button data-action="1" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          1
        </button>
        <button data-action="2" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          2
        </button>
        <button data-action="3" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          3
        </button>
        <button data-action="decimal" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem" }}>
          .
        </button>
        <button data-action="0" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem", gridColumn: "span 2" }}>
          0
        </button>
        <button data-action="equals" style={{ padding: "1rem", backgroundColor: "var(--color-accent)", color: "var(--color-text)", border: "none", borderRadius: "0.25rem", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "1rem", gridColumn: "span 2" }}>
          =
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const actionSpec = `
State shape: { display: string, expr: string }

Actions:
- "clear": Set display to "0" and expr to "".
- "delete": Remove the last character from expr. If expr becomes empty, set display to "0". Otherwise, set display to expr.
- "0"–"9": If expr is empty or the last action was equals, start a new number. Append digit to expr and set display to expr.
- "add", "subtract", "multiply", "divide": Append the operator symbol (+, −, ×, ÷) to expr and set display to expr.
- "decimal": If expr does not contain a decimal point, append "." to expr and set display to expr.
- "equals": Evaluate expr as a mathematical expression (supporting +, −, ×, ÷). Set display to the result (rounded to 10 decimal places) and expr to the result stringified.
`;

export { initialState, view, actionSpec };
